title: coryphopteris stereophylla
intro: Coryphopteris stereophylla, also known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Coryphopteris stereophylla has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues. Coryphopteris stereophylla can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
